en.st_up_ret_b1_descr: Protective sputter increases reliability and, more importantly, ensures airtightness, which prevents energy dissipation.
en.st_af_empty_descr:
Two disks of organic formation (commonly lipids, cellulose and lignin) with nothing but empty space in between. This is due to a unique gravitation field formed in the centre that stabilise the distance between the disks. 
Any attempt to press the disks together, or pull them apart will fail due to rapid positive/negative changes in the gravitational field. As if the artefact reacts to any physical power that breaks its balance. 
Because of this mechanism, moving with an Empty is a hard task. As the gravitational field increases the density of surrounding air and slows the body down. 
The real usefulness of this effect comes to the ability to reduce friction, thus obtaining great protection against physical impacts. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_zatp_b5_descr: A heavier and closed bolt prevents the pistol's bolt section from malfunctioning.
en.st_wpn_mossberg590a1_rail_descr:
A pump-action shotgun designed for military and law enforcement use, featuring a heavy-walled barrel and enhanced durability for extreme conditions. Its ergonomic design and ability to handle various ammunition types make it a versatile and dependable choice for close-quarters combat. With a reputation for reliability and rugged construction, it remains a staple in tactical and defensive applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
    Manufacturer: O.F. Mossberg & Sons
en.st_wpn_m60_descr:
From a family of American general-purpose machine guns firing from a disintegrating belt of M13 links, the M60 has served with every branch of the U.S. military and its manufacture and continued upgrade for military and commercial purchase continues into the 21st century. Although replaced or supplemented in most roles by other designs, most notably the M240 machine gun, it remains a tried-and-true ammunition-eating, suppressive fire, anti-personnel weapon.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Saco Defense, U.S. Ordnance
en.st_af_dragon_eye_descr:
Found near fire anomalies, with the appearance of a reptile's eye. If its bearer kills another being, there is a small chance that it will cause its body to violently detonate.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Perk Artefact
en.mutant_chimera_meat_description:
A rare and highly dangerous cut taken from the ferocious Chimera, known for its tough muscle fibers and unique taste. Since they are considered one of the most dangerous creatures, their meat is highly valued by veteran stalkers.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
    High-tier Mutant Meat
    Cookable
en.st_mineral_water_descr:
A sealed bottle containing calcium-infused carbonated mineral water from Ukrainian springs, rich in essential minerals. Offers a refreshing taste and replenishes vital nutrients lost during strenuous activities.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Drink
    Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_wpn_ks23_descr:
At its core, the KS-23 is a manually-actuated, pump-action "shotgun" that fires unique 23mm shells. Though, while displaying an appearance more akin to a shotgun, the Russians designated the KS-23 as a "Special Carbine" due to its large-caliber rifled 700mm barrel when compared to the standard smoothbore barrels of conventional shotguns.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_up_auto_b3_descr: Synchronization is achieved by means of a cog, which allows flatness to be increased.
en.ammo-7.62x51_ap_descr:
Military 7.62x51 calibre M61 armor-piercing round with a hardened steel core. It retains high damage while greatly improving performance against body armor.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR6 (62) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 59
en.st_up_helm_rad_2_descr: A plexiglass mask can provide partial protection from radiation.
en.st_wpn_fnx45_descr:
Improving on the FNP-45, the FNX-45 is the latest in technological advancements in handgun engineering, offering .45 ACP performance and a host of unique features that no other handgun can match. The cold hammer-forged stainless steel barrel has a threaded muzzle for the integrated suppressor and the stainless steel slide comes with high-profile combat night sights for easier target acquisition.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States, Belgium
    manufacturer: FN America
en.st_af_cristall_flower_descr:
This artefact resembles melted cheese interspersed with sapphire-like stones. Only yellow outer shell of the artefact appears to give off radiation and by careful processing it is possible to extract the non-radioactive blue parts for jewellery and other industrial purposes. This is due to the fact that if cleaned properly and polished, sapphire comparison becomes much more explicit: the stones are as hard and durable as this beautiful gem. This quality of theirs and their appearance make them perfect gemstones and jewellers all over the world strive to have them in stock. 
The usefulness of the artefact, however, is not limited to its industrial applications. There is scientific evidence suggesting that sapphire-like stones effectively protect from psy-waves, whereas the outer shell slightly increases resistance to toxicity. 
However, it can cause objects in its vicinity to heat up and in extreme cases to ignite along with the artefact. For this reason, it is safe to conclude that it absorbs heat and is able to convey it to other objects. 
Due to its density the weight of artefact has increased beyond normal standards, and thus it is one of the heaviest anomalous creations in the Zone. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_drug_anabiotic_descr:
An experimental drug developed by Professor Ozersky for scientific research teams working in the Zone. At its core, the drug contains tetrodotoxin, known colloquially as "zombie powder," which causes a complete shutdown of the body's central nervous system that may allow people to survive emissions outside cover. After six years worth of field tests, thoughtful stalkers know to keep a few on hand for unexpected blowouts.
 
 PROPERTIES:
   causes temporary blackout
   post-heals 100% entire body
en.st_up_bar_b2_descr: Installation of a barrel with additional threaded canals improves bullet speed and weapon accuracy at the cost of a considerable increase in recoil.
en.st_trigger_components_4: Single-fire Mode Trigger Mechanism with Firing Pin (Trigger)
en.st_grenade_smoke_descr:
A grenade used as a signaling or screening device for unit movement.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
en.ammo-7.62x51_fmj_descr:
The 7.62x51 NATO round is a military variant of the .308 round which was used as a standard-issue by the NATO forces until 5.56 ammunition was introduced in the '70s in the Vietnam War. At present, it is most commonly employed by private military contractors all over the world. The 7.62x51 round is a very common machine gun calibre, and can also be used in battle or sniper rifles.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (34) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 59
en.st_af_fountain_descr:
An artefact of presumably gravitational nature with a bizarre shape. Under a microscope, the surface of the item appears to be fractal, having unimaginably complex microstructures all the way to the atomic level. If equipped, it will replenish a small portion of any money lost.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_spas12_descr_new:
A combat shotgun with both pump-action and semi-automatic firing modes, designed for military, law enforcement, and tactical applications. Its distinctive folding stock and robust construction allow for adaptability in both close-quarters combat and breaching operations. Known for its aggressive design and versatility, it has become one of the most recognizable shotguns in pop culture and military history.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Italy
    Manufacturer: Franchi
en.st_hand_rolling_tobacco_descr:
Loose tobacco intended for hand-rolling, offering a customizable smoking experience. Resourceful Stalkers appreciate its versatility, allowing them to roll cigarettes to their preferred size and strength.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Stimulant
    Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_coffee_drink_descr:
Fresh, ready-to-drink UCC Cold Brew coffee for a refreshing stamina boost without the need for preparation. Often enjoyed for its convenience and revitalizing effect.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Drink
    Stimulant
    Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_addon_scope_zf4_descr:
A compact 4x telescopic sight issued late in WWII for semi-automatic and bolt-action German service rifles  most famously fitted to the G43/K43 and seen on some K98k examples with swept-back mounts. Simple, rugged optics with a 3-post (or crosshair) reticle and factory elevation preset around 300 m, built for quick engagement rather than long-range precision. Wartime production was by several German firms (Voigtlander among them), so markings and minor details vary between examples.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Germany
    Manufacturer: Germany
    Magnification: 4x
en.st_sausage_descr:
Cured and smoked meat links, packed with robust flavor and protein. Their preservation method ensures longevity, making them a reliable food source in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Food
en.st_wpn_ak12_custom_descr:
The standard service assault rifle of the Russian army, designed to replace older AK-74M and AK-100 series rifles. This model is the pinnacle of AK system development, different from the previous generations by its elaborate ergonomics, all-day usability and increased accuracy and precision. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode. This model is rarely encountered and is often found in the hands of the Monolith. It features an extended magazine and vertical foregrip for increased stability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_addon_scope_mauser_kit_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
    Lightweight Polymer Stock & Receiver
    High Zoom Variable Scope
    Elcan SpecterDR DFOV14-C2 Sight
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
    Mauser K98
en.st_af_ah_r1_descr:
An artifact containing mostly plant matter found only in the Dead Forest, south of Lab X-9. It is believed that the strong psy-fields it was subjugated to during its formation heavily influenced its shape and properties. Wearing one seems to boost vitality.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Artefact
en.st_af_ah_s1_descr:
An experimental and unstable artifact, created by artificial means. Where and under what circumstances it formed, is unknown. It seems to improve the natural healing process of the body via methods unknown to science.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Artefact
en.st_knife_swat_descr:
A compact, automatic knife designed for rapid deployment and close-quarters engagements. Its spring-assisted mechanism allows for quick access, making it an effective tool for special forces and covert operations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Use: Field Dressing Mutants
    Melee Weapon
    Light Attack Power: 54
    Heavy Attack Power: 78
    Armor Penetration: 35
    Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: YES
    Mutant Pelt Quality: 55% - 70%
en.st_wpn_sig220_n_upg220_descr:
Often considered the best out-of-the-box .45 caliber double-action pistol available, the P220 is known for accuracy that parallels that of competition handguns. An instant success, it has been adopted by the Swiss and Japanese SDF and many European police organizations. The "XXX" includes a threaded barrel, tritium iron sights, laser designator and 12-round magazine, among other various internal modifications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: West Germany, Switzerland
    manufacturer: SIG Sauer
    tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_pkm_zenit_siber_descr:
A classic Soviet-era general-purpose machine gun chambered in 7.62x54mmR, renowned for its ruggedness, simplicity, and reliability in combat. Designed in the 1960s, it remains in service with military forces around the world due to its lightweight design for its class and ease of maintenance. Its belt-fed system and adaptability make it effective in a wide range of roles, from infantry support to vehicle-mounted operations.
This model has been extensively modified with a Picatinny rail, vertical foregrip, muzzle brake, and laser designator, along with internal modifications to increase weapon fire rate.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Soviet Union
    Manufacturer: TsNIITochMash, Degtyaryov Plant
en.st_wpn_pmm_bas_descr:
A redesign of the legendary Makarov, the PMM uses a 25% increase in gas pressure to significantly increase muzzle velocity and features a larger 12-round magazine while keeping the same simplicity, ease of manufacturing and accuracy of the PM. Though, even with these changes slightly bridging the gap between itself and modern pistols, it still loses out in terms of weight and general performance. This model features a threaded barrel.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_wpn_svd_nimble_descr:
One of the most iconic sniper rifles despite not technically being a sniper rifle, the SVD was intended to provide precise, suppressive fire on enemy positions as well as pick off high value targets. However, this squad-level DMR was eventually pressed into service as a sniper by those with access to nothing else. Relatively light, precise and well-balanced, it unfortunately loses out to dedicated sniper rifles in performance. Fit with a 1P59 "Hyperon" scope, the "Lynx" is a custom-built masterpiece befit for a marksman of equal prestige.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_fort500_descr:
A smoothbore, pump-action shotgun intended to arm the Ministry of Internal Affairs, security services of Ukraine and civilians for amateur hunting and general use purposes. At present, the FORT-500 rifle has been discontinued in favor of newer models more specifically built for law enforcement use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Ukraine
    manufacturer: Fort NGO
en.st_wpn_aps_bas_descr:
The Stechkin APS is a Russian selective fire machine pistol, bearing the name of its designer Igor Stechkin. Originally chambered for 7.62x25mm Tokarev, the pistol was changed to use 9x18mm as it became clear that this cartridge was set to become the new service ammunition for handguns in the Soviet Army. In 1951, the Stechkin was introduced into the Soviet military arsenal, replacing the aging TT-33.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_cigarettes_russian_descr:
Locally produced, these unbranded Russian cigarettes are widely available and affordable. While lacking the prestige of imported brands, they deliver the necessary nicotine fix for weary stalkers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Stimulant
    Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_adrenalin_descr:
Epinephrine (also known as adrenalin) is a hormone and a neurotransmitter. Epinephrine has many functions in the body, instantly regulating heart rate, blood vessel and air passage diameters, and metabolic shifts. Epinephrine release is a crucial component of the fight-or-flight response of the sympathetic nervous system. The effects lead to increased blood glucose and fatty acids, providing substrates for instant energy production within cells throughout the body.
 
 PROPERTIES:
   very potent stimulant
   very potent dizziness removal
   first aid H T A L
en.st_wpn_sks_tac_descr:
A semi-automatic, gas-operated, self-loading carbine used primarily during the Cold War, the SKS still sees service today with second-line and reserve army units. As it lacked a fire select and was limited to 10 rounds, it was made obsolete by the AK-47. This model has been modified with a lighter trigger allowing for a significantly increased rate of fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.st_af_blood_descr:
A reddish formation of compressed fossilised plants, soil and animal debris. Can partially neutralise chemical poisons by absorbing them and reducing overall toxicity level in user's bloodstream. Quite widespread and not very effective as it makes chemical burns fester. It will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. 
Another positive effect possessed by this artefact is that it accelerates clotting if worn close to the body. Although it is not recommended to keep this artefact in your possession for longer periods of time as blood clots can be hazardous to your health. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_addon_scope_ncstar_ado_descr:
The NcSTAR ADO P4 Sniper 39x42 Riflescope is a variable magnification optic featuring an integrated red-dot sight. The red-dot lens flips up to the deployed position and automatically turns on with the push of a button, and flips down to the stored position to turn off. It includes an auto-locking quick release mount compatible with Weaver and Picatinny rails.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
    Manufacturer: NcSTAR
    Magnification: 1x (red-dot) / 39x (scope)
en.st_kolbasa_descr:
This sausage was originally intended to be a dietary supplement for people exhibiting signs of prolonged starvation. Because it was a mild-tasting, inexpensive and relatively healthy source of meat, Doctor's Sausage became very popular in the USSR. Its extended shelf life make it a practical choice for sustenance in the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Food
en.st_ration_ru_descr:
Known as the "Individual Food Ration," this pack offers a full day's worth of nourishment, including canned meats, crackers, and beverage mixes. Designed for Russian forces, its compact and sturdy packaging ensures resilience in harsh conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Food
en.st_wpn_bm16_descr:
A break-action, double barrel shotgun intended for amateur hunting and general civilian use. The barrels and stock have been manually shortened to make the weapon lighter and more compact. Though quick to wield, its range and accuracy suffers but it is a devastating close range weapon, nonetheless.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_sr1m_descr:
A semi-automatic pistol designed as an analogue of the famous Italian Beretta for the Russian military. However, the constructors decided to make their upcoming creation more powerful and effective in close combat. The result surpassed their greatest expectations, as the newly arrived SR-1 Gyurza was immediately adopted by the Federal Protective Services.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: TsNIITochMash Institute
en.ammo-338-lapua_descr:
The .338 Lapua Magnum is a specialised rimless bottlenecked centrefire cartridge developed for military long-range sniper rifles. The Afghanistan War and Iraq War made it a combat-proven round with ready and substantial ammunition availability. The .338 Lapua is a dual-purpose anti-personnel and anti-materiel round, but its anti-materiel potential is limited.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): Unlimited (140) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 130
en.st_addon_scope_burris_tac30_descr:
Compact low-powered variable optic tuned for close-quarters speed and practical mid-range work. The 14x range and a ballistic-style CQ reticle (calibrated around 5.56) allow fast transitions between hip-level engagements and aimed fire at moderate distances, while the wide field of view favors target tracking in dynamic encounters. Rugged construction and simple controls make it an affordable, no-nonsense LPVO for general combat use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
    Manufacturer: Burris
    Magnification: 14x
en.st_wpn_val_modern_descr:
Engineered for Soviet special operations units, the AS Val is a gas operated, integrally suppressed weapon that was set to supersede the AK-47 and AKM rifles. It is easily disassembled and concealed, lightweight and comfortable to fire with the suppressor reducing bullet velocity to below subsonic levels. Today, the AS VAL sees widespread use among Russian special forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_beer_descr:
Ukrainian beer encompasses a variety of brews crafted in Ukraine, reflecting the country's rich brewing heritage. These beers range from light lagers to robust ales and are a very popular beverage in the Zone, besides vodka.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Drink
    Alcohol
en.st_af_ring_descr:
A very small artefact of electric nature. Difficult to spot. Consists of two ring-shaped materials of organic nature, hence the given name. When the Ring spins, it never stops spinning, defying the first law of thermodynamics. Scientists suggest that this artefact inherits gravitational properties from Vortex anomalies. 
The outer ring has a high-conductivity. It absorbs electrical current from relative sources then ground it in the inner ring. Despite the basic function, the mechanism behind the disappearance of electrical power inside the second ring is still unknown. 
On the other side, the Ring is flammable. Prolonged exposure may enhance its flammability and cause it to ignite. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_af_baloon_descr:
A compound of several hollow organic formations, this artefact emits a gaseous substance that can neutralise chemical or toxic particles inside the body without harming it. Thus providing a a great level of toxic and chemical protection. 
It also has a constant temperature regardless of its surroundings. This allows it to absorb heat from its vicinity and to create a little pocket around the user which prevents the flames from damaging the body. 
Apart from that Bubble, however, possesses numerous negative properties. For example, it greatly amplifies the effects of psy-waves as well as fields produced by mutants and anomalies. This disadvantage is not to be taken lightly: some stalkers have reported that psy influence was so potent when in possession of a Bubble that they felt their heads cracking from the inside and the only thing they could do was scream in pain and run as far as they could. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_wpn_vepr12_descr:
Conceived for the Russian military and law enforcement market, with civilian applications ranging from hunting to self-defense and competition, the Vepr-12 is a multi-purpose, semi-automatic shotgun patterned after Kalashnikov rifles and built on the heavy RPK light machine gun receiver. With its fixed open port gas system, the Vepr-12 can effectively cycle a multitude of 12-gauge loads, making it a highly versatile semi-automatic shotgun.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Molot Oruzhie Ltd.
en.st_marijuana_descr:
Self-grown cannabis. Smoking it is a popular pastime, especially among Freedomers who've served at the Barrier. Marijuana bags can be bought here and there in the Zone. Some believe that the drug helps retain a balance of the mind.
 
 PROPERTIES:
   improves morale and mind protection against horrors of the Zone
   potent dizziness removal
en.ammo-11.43x23-fmj_descr:
The .45 calibre full metal jacket round has enjoyed popularity for a hundred years thanks to its ballistic performance and a relatively small propelling charge. As a result, the bullet in this round is relatively slow but highly accurate and provides considerable stopping power.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR2 (20) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 27
en.st_wpn_walther_descr:
Legacy and innovation collide to create one of the most iconic and influential pistols in Walthers history. High-performance and feature-rich, the P99 quickly became one of the most trusted pistols of Law Enforcement officers around the world.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany
    manufacturer: Carl Walther GmbH Sportwaffen
en.st_wpn_remington700_magpul_pro_descr:
The Remington Model 700 is a series of bolt-action centerfire rifles manufactured by Remington Arms since 1962. It is a development of the Remington 721 and 722 series of rifles, which were introduced in 1948. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Remington Arms
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_pmm_descr:
A redesign of the legendary Makarov, the PMM uses a 25% increase in gas pressure to significantly increase muzzle velocity and features a larger 12-round magazine. Though, even with these changes slightly bridging the gap between itself and modern pistols, it still loses out in terms of weight and general performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_addon_silencer_descr:
A suppressor developed for the U.S. military, optimized for small-caliber rifles to enhance stealth and reduce muzzle blast.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
    5.56x45mm
en.st_addon_scope_sr1upgr1_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
    Threaded Barrel (for Suppressor)
    Tritium Iron Sights
    Laser Sight Module
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
    Serdyukov SR1M Gyurza
en.ammo-5.56x45-ss190_descr:
A standard-issue NATO 5.56x45 calibre round with an hollow point tip.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): None (13) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 52
en.st_addon_scope_pl15_scolaz_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
    LAM
    Aimpoint T1 Scope
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
    Lebedev PL-15
en.st_up_rad_1_descr: Rubber is a basic way of protection from brief radiation exposure.
en.st_wpn_rpg7_descr:
Considered as one of the most successful anti-tank grenade launchers ever made, the RPG-7 is a shoulder fired, single shot, smoothbore launcher. Grenades are loaded from the front with the rear of the barrel using a venturi nozzle to make the weapon nearly recoilless.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Degtyaryov Plant
en.st_survival_kit_descr:
A compact all-purpose kit containing fabric, sewing needles and a few leather strips primarily used as a means to stop bleeding and treat lacerations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Post-heals: T(8) A(3) L(3)
en.st_up_roun_a1_descr: Special gas exit canals around the drum part of the weapon that reduce recoil.
en.st_addon_scope_deltapoint_descr:
A premium micro red dot sight by Leupold, known for its wide field of view, motion-activated illumination, and exceptional clarity. It is popular for handguns, rifles, and tactical applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
    Manufacturer: Leupold
    Magnification: 1.0x
en.st_af_vyvert_descr:
This bizarrely-shaped artefact appears in places with increased gravitational activity. 
Although it appears almost organic, it is actually more similar to coral. Due to its gravitational nature, It provides protection against physical impacts as it greatly reduces the friction caused by fast objects. 
Acting as a kind of sponge that absorbs chemical and toxic elements as well, this artefact provides protection from external toxic agents as well as from chemical particles that have already made their way into the body. 
Wrenced can generate a locally directed gravity field which increases its mass. For this reason, this artefact is heavy. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_af_dummy_battery_descr:
The artefact is quite popular in the Zone and is valued by its residents and visitors alike for its energizing properties, although it has an adverse effect on the body when used for prolonged periods of time. 
One should take note, however, that this artefact hinders blood clotting and increases bleeding rate of open wounds. On the other hand, being a powerful resistor, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. 
Being an artefact of electric nature, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. On the contrary, it should be noted that Battery absorbs heat and is able to convey it to other objects. 
This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_add_a2_descr: Installation of a mount for attachment of an optical scope.
en.st_up_pris_c1_descr: A component for large calibre weapons with powerful recoil installed in the stock.
en.st_wpn_m4_descr:
The M4 Carbine descends from a family of firearms tracing its lineage back to the original AR-15 by ArmaLite. It is a gas operated, air cooled, selective fire rifle, sharing 80% of its parts with the M16 assault rifle, though it is notably shorter and lighter. It has been adopted by United States Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) and is the preferred weapon of the U.S. Army Special Forces and Navy SEALs.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Colt's Manufacturing Company
en.st_af_electra_flash_descr:
This artefact is very similar in appearance to Moonlight and resembles a plasma globe or a plasma lamp. 
Being a powerful resistor, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. 
When worn, it is known to slightly counter harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of certain mutants. Flash acts as a powerful resistor and will absorb even lethal doses of electricity. 
However, it also hinders healing process, thus caution is advised especially when wounded or bleeding. This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_af_bat_descr:
A bewildering, but unmistakable sight in the Zone. Consisting of two glowing, purple, bat-like "wings" apparently shielding an internal orb. When placed against another artefact, the Bat transmutes it into a more powerful similar artefact. The Bat is destroyed in the process, seemingly converted into pure energy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_sr2_veresk_descr:
A Russian submachine gun created as a compact weapon capable of engaging enemies wearing Russian class-II body armor and soft-skinned vehicles at distances up to 200 meters. The SR-2M is a modified version with a forward pistol grip under the handguard and a fully-foldable stock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: TsNIITochMash
en.st_up_binoc_a1_descr: Installation of new lens set for farther distances, which offers x10 magnification power.
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_10: Grade-A Polyethylene Plates w/ Expanded Carrier
en.st_wpn_toz34_obrez_descr:
Intended for professional and amateur hunting, the TOZ-34 is an over/under double-barreled shotgun that acquired the state quality mark of the USSR. The barrels and stock have been manually shortened to make the weapon lighter and more compact. Though quick to wield, its range and accuracy suffers but it is a devastating close range weapon, nonetheless.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: USSR
    manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.ammo-7.62x54-r_descr:
Special type of 7.62x54r rounds specifically designed for the constraints of light-machine guns like PKP or PKM, allowing easier full auto recoil control and a cheaper price per ammunition thanks to the reduced amounts of gun powder (grains). The hardened steel heads tend to better penetrate hard objects compared to other 7.62x54r rounds, but at the cost of soft targets over penetration. The reduced grains also tend to have a lower impact and thus reduced internal damages compared to standard sniper variants of 7.62x54r ammunition.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (37) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 52
en.st_meat_flesh_descr:
Strips of fatty Flesh meat, cooked until crispy and surprisingly flavorful. Its one of the more palatable mutant meals.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
    Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
    Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
    Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Cooked Meal
en.ammo-12x70-buck_self_descr:
Home-made 12 gauge shell filled with small pieces of metal junk, including used or damaged bullets or even shrapnel. Highly lethal at close range. Only suitable for use with smoothbore weapons.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): none
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): medium - high
 
SPECIAL:
 
 -  expanding cloud of pellets, short eff. range
en.st_tushonka_descr:
Tushonka is a common name of canned, stewed meat produced in the Soviet Union and other Warsaw Pact countries. It has become a primary means of long-time meat preservation, used both by the civilian population and as a standard-issue Red Army food ration. Tushonka is known for its high nutrition value and relatively good taste.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Food
en.mutant_snork_hand_description:
A severed, clawed hand from a Snork, usually kept as a trophy or proof of a kill rather than for consumption. Though technically edible, most stalkers avoid it as it is seen to be cannibalistic and immoral. Note that consuming uncooked mutant meat always carries the risk of contamination or radiation exposure.
 
 WARNING: Raw Meat
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Low-tier Mutant Meat
    Cookable
en.ammo-5.56x45-ap_descr:
The latest NATO military 5.56x45 calibre enhanced penetration round, known as M855A1, used by the US armed forces. Increased effectiveness against both body armour and soft tissue.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR5 (52) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 35
en.st_wpn_hs2000_descr:
The choice sidearm of the Croatian military and law enforcement, the HS2000 is a semi-automatic, striker-fired pistol known for its excellent ergonomics and outstanding safety features. Today, the HS family of pistols, based on the HS2000, has evolved into more than 50 different models.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Croatia
    manufacturer: HS Produkt
en.ammo_9x21_sp10_descr:
Pistol cartridge with a bullet of increased penetration. Designed to destroy manpower protected by personal protective equipment. The nose part of the heat-strengthened steel core protrudes from the shell, due to which a high penetration effect of the bullet is achieved.
 
 -  Armor penetration power: BR3 (32) 
 -  Flesh damage power: 27
en.st_drug_coagulant_descr:
Ukrainian Vikasolum - an artificial equivalent of vitamin K. The main purpose of this drug is to increase blood coagulation speed. In great demand among stalkers who want slow-healing wounds and lacerations inflicted by mutants to close up faster. The effects of the drug are long-lasting. Take two tablets at a time.
 
 PROPERTIES:
   post-heals T
en.st_brewed_coffee_descr:
A luxury in the Zone, offering a brief boost to stamina and alertness. Its rich aroma and warmth provide a small but invaluable comfort to Stalkers enduring the cold and exhaustion of the wasteland.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Drink
    Stimulant
    Alcohol Sobering Effect
en.st_chocolate_descr:
A confectionery treat, offering a brief moment of indulgence. While not of premium quality, it satisfies sweet cravings in the bleakness of the Zone. Brings back many fond childhood memories, which may help soothe the pain of living in the harsh and unforgiving conditions of the Zone.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Food
en.st_up_ace52_a5_descr: Installation of a heavier barrel to improve recoil.
en.st_wpn_gsh18_descr:
In the early 2000s, the Russian military sought a new light, effective and easily concealable sidearm to replace the Makarov. Designed by Gryazev and Shipunow, the outcome was the Gsh-18; a recoil-operated, striker-fired, locked breech pistol and, at the time of production, the lightest pistol in the world. It was immediately adopted by all branches of the Russian military.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_af_mincer_meat_descr:
This artefact has soft, porous, skin-like texture and is said to be able to compress. It resembles and acts like a sponge in this regard, but reveals its special characteristics only when exposed to certain external conditions. 
Firstly, to carry the sponge metaphor further, the pores on its surface are known to absorb small amounts of toxicity from environment. 
Secondly, the artefact slightly amplifies the damaging effects of psy-fields to living organisms by absorbing psy energy and emitting it at a small rate. 
Thirdly, Meat Chunk is also known to be a conductor of electricity much like the skin of a living creature. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_af_serofim_descr:
An electrical artefact that generates a magnetic field. It is made up of several translucent, blue layers surrounding a bright center. If its bearer were to be suddenly killed, this artefact would take their place and allow the user to go on living.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_m4a1_descr:
The M4 Carbine descends from a family of firearms tracing its lineage back to the original AR-15 by ArmaLite. It is a gas operated, air cooled, selective fire rifle, sharing 80% of its parts with the M16 assault rifle, though it is notably shorter and lighter. It has been adopted by United States Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) and is the preferred weapon of the U.S. Army Special Forces and Navy SEALs. The A1 variant strengthened the barrel and replaced the burst-fire fire select with a fully automatic option.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Colt's Manufacturing Company
en.st_breadold_descr:
A loaf of bread that has hardened over time, losing its initial freshness. Despite its texture, it remains edible and can be softened with liquids or used in cooking.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Food
en.st_af_kislushka_descr:
A hollow spherical formation resembling a transparent parchment covered with a layer of film. Pleasant to the touch. This artefact will drastically speed up the process of blood clotting, though this will also lead to the user needing more food to replenish the energy that it takes.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Perk Artefact
en.st_up_add_b3_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.
en.st_meat_boar_descr:
Thick cuts of boar meat, seasoned with salt and various herbs. Easily the most popular warm meal among stalkers.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
    Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
    Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
    Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Cooked Meal
en.ammo_vog_30_descr: A VOG-30 fragmentation grenade is designed to destroy enemy manpower and fire weapons located in open areas. An improved version in comparison with analogues, developed in the 1980s, has a more powerful fragmentation effect, as well as autonomous sealing of the propellant charge in the cartridge.\n
en.st_wpn_m79_descr:
A shoulder-fired, break-action, single shot grenade launcher first appearing during the Vietnam War. Recoil is kept low by means of a 'High-Low Propulsion System' where propellant is stored in a high-pressure chamber, allowing much larger projectiles to be launched without the heavy equipment usually needed. When the propellant is ignited, the gases are bled out through vents at reduced pressure to a much larger, low-pressure chamber to push the projectile forward. The high-low system allows the weight of the weapon and its ammunition to be reduced significantly.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Springfield Armory
en.st_addon_scope_gauss_sight_descr:
A rare Ukrainian thermal sight developed for specialized operations, offering 110x variable zoom in a compact, rugged housing. Its high-sensitivity thermal sensor provides rapid heat-signature detection through smoke, darkness, or cluttered environments. Built for precision and demanding careful maintenance, it was produced in very limited quantities for elite or experimental units.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Ukraine
    Manufacturer: REDACTED
    Magnification: 110x
    Thermal Toggle: press Mark Switch key
en.st_bolt_carrier_10: Sliding Bolt Carrier with Turning Bolt Lock [NATO] (Carrier)
en.st_af_repei_descr:
A relatively common sight within gravitational anomalies, this artefact resembles the Thorn, an artefact not discovered in many years. While the Thorn caused bleeding to its user, the Thistle causes it to their enemies, impeding clotting and thinning blood.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_usas12_descr:
A gas-operated, selective fire, automatic shotgun designed to provide sustained firepower in close-combat scenarios. Although semi-automatic shotguns are common in military and law enforcement use, automatic shotguns are a niche market. Within that niche market, the USAS-12 is one of the most common and successful models available.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: South Korea
    manufacturer: Daewoo Precision Industries
en.st_wpn_fn2000e_nimble_descr:
The aim of the FN F2000 was to produce a modular weapon offering all of the popular features of the modern assault rifle such as a compact bullpup layout, an ambidextrous frame and a design with plenty of available options and addons. So far, the FN F2000 rifle has found only a few buyers, including the Armed Forces of Slovenia and Belgian Special Operations Forces. Regardless, it is in no doubt a unique and futuristic-looking weapon, looking like something straight out of a sci-fi movie. Equipped with an EOTech sight and specially modified for a faster rate of fire, the "Competitor" knows only competition.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Belgium
    manufacturer: FN Herstal
en.st_wpn_sig220_nimble_descr:
Often considered the best out-of-the-box .45 caliber double-action pistol available, the P220 is known for accuracy that parallels that of competition handguns. An instant success, it has been adopted by the Swiss and Japanese SDF and many European police organizations. This limited edtion model has been fine tuned for better performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: West Germany, Switzerland
    manufacturer: SIG Sauer
en.st_up_1921_b9_descr: Installation of a tweaked locking mechanism to greatly enhance reliability.
en.st_wpn_xm8_descr:
A lightweight assault rifle system sharing design and engineering with the G36 rifle originally part of the Objective Individual Combat Weapon program for development of a "smart" grenade launcher system with an underslung carbine rifle. Unable to meet performance and weight requirements, the program was eventually canceled and separated, resulting in the XM8 project.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany, United States
    manufacturer: Heckler & Koch, Alliant Technosystems
en.st_wpn_xm4_descr:
The M4 Carbine descends from a family of firearms tracing its lineage back to earlier carbine versions of the M16, all based on the original AR-15 made by ArmaLite. It is a shorter and lighter version of the M16 assault rifle, sharing 80% of its parts. The M4 fires 5.56x45mm NATO ammunition and are gas operated, air cooled, magazine fed, selective fire firearms with a 4 position telescoping stock. As with many carbines, the M4 is handy and more convenient to carry than a full length rifle. It has been adopted by United States Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) and is the preferred weapon of the U.S. Army Special Forces and Navy SEALs.
 
 ATTACHMENTS: 
    Suppressor: ADVANCED ARMAMENT (AAC) M4-2000
en.st_wpn_winchester1873_descr: The Winchester 1873 lever-action rifle, often referred to as the "Gun that Won the West," is a historic and iconic firearm introduced in 1873 by the Winchester Repeating Arms Company. Known for its reliability and innovation, this rifle played a significant role in the American frontier and beyond. Chambered in various popular calibers of the time, such as .44-40 and .38-40, it featured a distinctive lever mechanism that allowed for rapid and efficient reloading, making it a favorite among cowboys, lawmen, and outlaws alike. Its elegant design, smooth action, and remarkable durability contributed to its legendary status, making it a prized collector's item today. The Winchester 1873 lever-action rifle symbolizes the spirit of the Wild West and remains an enduring symbol of American firearm history. Adapted to use both .357 ammunition and a modern scope for easier access. \n \n
en.st_wpn_toz194_descr:
A conventional pump-action shotgun intended for amateur hunting and general civilian use. Its main feature is its oddly long 540mm barrel; a necessary feature to meet the 805mm requirement for legal civilian ownership in Russia.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_walther_p99_descr:
Legacy and innovation collide to create one of the most iconic and influential pistols in Walthers history. High-performance and feature-rich, the P99 quickly became one of the most trusted pistols of Law Enforcement officers around the world.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany
    manufacturer: Carl Walther GmbH Sportwaffen
en.st_wpn_ak74_isg_descr:
A custom model developed on the foundation of the AK-74N by the American company Rifle Dynamics. It is one of the most high-quality and modern weapons in the Zone. Several shipments of Rifle Dynamics' AK variants were sent to Ukraine for weapons trials with the goal of adoption by Ukrainian Special Forces, Rifle Dynamics was looking to sell manufacturing licenses to Eastern European Powers. However the trials were cancelled and the AK12 2016 was adopted along with the AEK for special forces. Several of these Rifle Dynamics Demonstration and Trials guns have slowly made their way to the zone over the years and are exclusively used by ISG special units.
 
 ATTACHMENTS: 
    Devices: ATPIAL (Advanced Target Pointer Illuminator Aiming Laser) AN/PEQ-15 produced by L3 Insight Technologies. Tactical device that combines laser designators in both visible and IR band with IR searchlight. 
    Scopes: All scopes for picatinny.
    Silencer: Rifle Dynamics ISG Sound Suppressor
en.st_gas_tube_9: Ejector from Over-under Double-barrel Shotgun [R] (Gas Tube)
en.st_wpn_vssk_descr:
A integrally suppressed Russian bullpup, straight-pull bolt-action sniper rifle chambered for subsonic rounds. Intended for special stealth operations, typical targets for the VKS are combatants in heavy body armor or located behind cover.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: CKIB SOO
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_vsk94n_descr:
A suppressed designated marksman rifle based on the 9A-91 platform, built for silent, precise engagements at medium range. Featuring an integral suppressor and compatibility with high-powered optics, it is ideal for reconnaissance and covert operations. Its compact size and low recoil make it highly effective for eliminating targets without revealing the shooters position.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Russia
    Manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_wpn_vityaznew_descr:
The "Knight" is modern Russian submachine gun designed for law enforcement and special forces, offering a high rate of fire and excellent reliability in close-quarters combat. Modeled after the AK platform, it features a lightweight, compact frame with a folding stock for better maneuverability. Its compatibility with suppressors and various tactical attachments makes it a versatile choice for urban operations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Russia
    Manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_vintorez_nimble_descr:
Intended for various Spetsnaz troops of the Soviet Army, KGB and MVD, the VSS is quite popular among its users for its stealthy capabilities, integral suppressor and the great lethality of the heavy 9x39mm round. The "Tide" has been extensively modified and fitted with a 1PN93 scope.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_vintorez_n1_descr:
Intended for various Spetsnaz troops of the Soviet Army, KGB and MVD, the VSS is quite popular among its users for its stealthy capabilities, integral suppressor and the great lethality of the heavy 9x39mm round.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_vintorez_m2_descr:
Intended for various Spetsnaz troops of the Soviet Army, KGB and MVD, the VSS is quite popular among its users for its stealthy capabilities, integral suppressor and the great lethality of the heavy 9x39mm round. This model is an early prototype. This model includes a vertical foregrip and laser designator and was made and extensively modified on request for an unknown member of the mercenaries. The workmanship is absolutely exceptional.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_vintorez_1pn93_descr:
Intended for various Spetsnaz troops of the Soviet Army, KGB and MVD, the VSS is quite popular among its users for its stealthy capabilities, integral suppressor and the great lethality of the heavy 9x39mm round. This model has an integrated 1PN93 scope.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_vintorez_descr:
Intended for various Spetsnaz troops of the Soviet Army, KGB and MVD, the VSS is quite popular among its users for its stealthy capabilities, integral suppressor and the great lethality of the heavy 9x39mm round.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_vihrn_descr:
Based on the suppressed AS Val assault rifle and intended for concealed carry by special VIP protection teams and State Security operatives, the SR-3M Vikhr "Whirlwind" is a result of combining the qualities of the SR-3, AS VAL and VSS Vintorez. The SR-3M has a larger magazine which also provides more reliable feeding during automatic fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Russia
    Manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_wpn_val_tac_descr:
Engineered for Soviet special operations units, the AS Val is a gas operated, integrally suppressed weapon that was set to supersede the AK-47 and AKM rifles. It is easily disassembled and concealed, lightweight and comfortable to fire with the suppressor reducing bullet velocity to below subsonic levels. Today, the AS VAL sees widespread use among Russian special forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_corn_descr:
Canned sweet corn imported from outside the Zone. It adds variety to a Stalker's otherwise monotonous diet, offering natural sugars for a quick energy boost when needed.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Food
en.st_wpn_k98_mod_silen98_descr:
A directly-modified version of the WWII German sniper rifle Mauser Karabiner 98k. The wooden stock was replaced with a more ergonomic polymer one. The rifle is equipped with an excellent sniper scope manufactured by MARCH, Japan.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Nazi Germany
    manufacturer: Mauser
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_jgut_descr:
A haemostatic rubber tourniquet, allowing the user to stop bleeding.
 
 PROPERTIES:
   first aid T A L
en.st_wpn_usp_tac_descr:
A semi-automatic pistol designed as an improvement of the USP featuring a weighted barrel extension, polygonal rifling and an adjustable trigger that improves weapon accuracy and performance. Used by special forces and competitive shooters worldwide, the USP Match considered a top-of-the-line weapon able to compete with the elite. The custom features a threaded barrel and extended 22-round magazine.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany
    manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
    tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_usp_nimble_descr:
Originally designed for the American market, the United States law enforcement and military provided much of the design criteria for the USP. Used by many police and special forces units worldwide, the Universal Self-Loading Pistol is known as an accurate and reliable handgun able to withstand extreme punishment and adverse conditions. The "Wolfhound" is a heavily modified USP Match once belonging to a mercenary of the same name.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany
    manufacturer: Heckler & Koch
en.st_wpn_walther_p99_mod9_descr:
Legacy and innovation collide to create one of the most iconic and influential pistols in Walthers history. High-performance and feature-rich, the P99 quickly became one of the most trusted pistols of Law Enforcement officers around the world. Includes a threaded barrel, tritium sights and laser designator.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany
    manufacturer: Carl Walther GmbH Sportwaffen
    tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_type63_descr:
A fully-automatic, rotating bolt assault rifle bearing a striking resemblance to the Soviet-made SKS. The Type 63 was intended to replace the Type 56 semi-automatic carbine in Chinese service when military infantry needed a compromise between firepower and long range accuracy.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: China
    manufacturer: PRC Government Arsenals
en.st_af_ah_f1_descr:
A never-before-seen artifact with remarkable properties. It seems to be of organic origin and is very symmetrical; an unusual property for artifacts found in the Zone. It increases the structural and tensile strength of any material it comes in proximity with. Eerily, it seems to release barely audible and unintelligible whispers.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Artefact
en.wpn_tt33_descr:
A Soviet, semi-automatic pistol developed as a service pistol for the Soviet military to replace the Nagant M1895 revolver. During its lifetime, many communist or Soviet bloc countries made variations of the TT-33 pistol until it was eventually replaced by the Makarov PM in 1952.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_up_bard_c4_descr: Cylindrical drilling of barrel helps to improve the weapon's rate of fire without affecting accuracy.
en.st_addon_sil_hex23_descr:
A heavy-duty suppressor designed for high-caliber weapons, offering superior noise suppression and recoil control.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Russia
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
    23mm
en.ammo_20x70_buck_descr:
Standard 20-calibre round filled with 6 mm buckshot. Highly lethal at close range. Only suitable for use with smoothbore weapons
 
   Highest pierced armour class: none
   Tissue damage rating: medium - high
 
SPECIAL:
 
   expanding cloud of pellets, short eff. range 
 -  Armor penetration power: None (3 x 9) 
 -  Flesh damage power: 143 (16 x 9)
en.st_wpn_toz34_descr:
Intended for professional and amateur hunting, the TOZ-34 is an over/under double-barreled shotgun that acquired the state quality mark of the USSR. It is heavy, dependable and packs a punch.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: USSR
    manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.st_meat_pseudodog_descr:
Thick slices of pseudodog meat, grilled until well-done to ensure safety. The meat is rich and gamey and offers good nutritional value due to the creature's thick muscles.
 
 NOTE: The quality and healthiness of a meal is determined by how it is prepared.
    Zone-produced meals, while less contaminated, are still unhealthy.
    Stewed meals require the addition of clean water and are significantly less contaminated.
    Purified meals required the addition of vodka and are not only radiation-free but provide revitalizing effects.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Cooked Meal
en.st_af_cristall_descr:
This artefact is formed in anomalous zones with intense thermal activity. Actively consumes excessive heat and remains cool at all times. 
It will also protect the user against electrical currents. On the other hand, exposure to such environments makes the artefact increase the conductivity due to unknown as of now mechanism. For this reason, one is forced to weigh pros and cons of Crystal when in the vicinity of areas of high conductivity. 
This artefact is also highly sought for by jewellers outside the Zone as its inner core is not radioactive and considered to be of exceptional beauty if polished and refined. Only the first 1 cm of its outer layer emits radiation. 
It is, however, highly advised to proceed with caution when planning to bring the artefact to the market as prolonged exposure to even minimal amounts of radioactive materials can result in death of the user. Covered with very hard layer. Relatively heavy due to high density. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_wpn_m4_tac_descr:
The M4 Carbine descends from a family of firearms tracing its lineage back to the original AR-15 by ArmaLite. It is a gas operated, air cooled, selective fire rifle, sharing 80% of its parts with the M16 assault rifle, though it is notably shorter and lighter. It has been adopted by United States Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) and is the preferred weapon of the U.S. Army Special Forces and Navy SEALs. The A1 variant strengthened the barrel and replaced the burst-fire fire select with a fully automatic option. This model has been extensively modified, including but not limited to a vertical foregrip extended magazine and multi-point Picatinny rail. It's performance is exceptional.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Colt's Manufacturing Company
en.st_wpn_toz106_descr:
Widely known by its vernacular name, the Death of the Chairman for its compact size, the TOZ-106 is a bolt-action, single-barreled 20 gauge shotgun with a sliding breech bolt.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Tulsky Oruzheiny Zavod
en.st_wpn_thompson_m1a1_descr:
A simplified version of the iconic submachine gun, designed for mass production and military use during World War II. Featuring a straight blowback action and a box magazine, it retains the firepower of its predecessors while being more cost-effective and easier to manufacture. Its durability and stopping power made it a favored weapon among soldiers in frontline combat.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
    Manufacturer:  Birmingham Small Arms
en.st_wpn_svu_nimble_descr:
A rare, compact, fully automatic version of the SVD sniper rifle created for use by the airborne infantry but later employed mainly by the Russian Ministry of Internal Affairs. The main difference between it and the SVD is its compact size and thus improved handling, thanks to a bullpup configuration and shortened barrel.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_wpn_svu_descr:
A rare, compact version of the SVD sniper rifle created for use by the airborne infantry but later employed mainly by the Russian Ministry of Internal Affairs. The main difference between it and the SVD is its compact size and thus improved handling, thanks to a bullpup configuration and shortened barrel.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_wpn_sig550_descr:
A precision-engineered assault rifle known for its reliability, accuracy, and robust construction, making it a favorite among military forces. Featuring a long barrel, folding stock, and a full-length rail system, it provides excellent performance in both medium and long-range engagements. Its durability and smooth operation in harsh environments make it a trusted choice for professional operators.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Switzerland
    Manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.st_wpn_ak12_m1_descr:
The standard service assault rifle of the Russian army, designed to replace older AK-74M and AK-100 series rifles. This model is the pinnacle of AK system development, different from the previous generations by its elaborate ergonomics, all-day usability and increased accuracy and precision. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_wpn_svds_pmc_descr:
One of the most iconic sniper rifles despite not technically being a sniper rifle, the SVD was intended to provide precise, suppressive fire on enemy positions as well as pick off high value targets. However, this squad-level DMR was eventually pressed into service as a sniper by those with access to nothing else. Relatively light, precise and well-balanced, it unfortunately loses out to dedicated sniper rifles in performance. The SVDS is a compact version of the SVD using a foldable buttstock. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_svds_descr:
One of the most iconic sniper rifles despite not technically being a sniper rifle, the SVD was intended to provide precise, suppressive fire on enemy positions as well as pick off high value targets. However, this squad-level DMR was eventually pressed into service as a sniper by those with access to nothing else. Relatively light, precise and well-balanced, it unfortunately loses out to dedicated sniper rifles in performance. The SVDS is a compact version of the SVD using a foldable buttstock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_g43_descr:
In 1940, the Germans enacted a program to deliver a standard semi-automatic rifle to their infantry ranks to help improve upon their outdated bolt-action rifles. With the Gewehr 41 being too expensive for wartime mass production, the Gewehr 43 was created fielding a number of improvements over its predecessor, including a redesigned gas system, detachable magazine and machined side mount. This model comes with a ZF4 scope.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Nazi Germany
    manufacturer: Walther GmbH
en.st_wpn_svd_descr:
One of the most iconic sniper rifles despite not technically being a sniper rifle, the SVD was intended to provide precise, suppressive fire on enemy positions as well as pick off high value targets. However, this squad-level DMR was eventually pressed into service as a sniper by those with access to nothing else. Relatively light, precise and well-balanced, it unfortunately loses out to dedicated sniper rifles in performance.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_sv98_descr:
A highly ergonomic, highly accurate Russian bolt action sniper rifle, the Snaiperskaya Vintovka Model 1998 was designed as a precision weapon for the Russian military and law enforcement snipers to effectively engage enemy personnel at ranges up to 1,000 meters.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Izhmash, Kalashnikov Concern
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_steyr_scout_big_descr:
Developed together with the American legend Marine Lieutenant Colonel Jeff Cooper, the Scout is a combination of future oriented design and innovative technical solutions. Versatile, lightweight and accurate up to 800m, it is the epitome of fine craftsmanship in a rifle. This model is chambered in 7.62x51mm.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Austria
    Manufacturer: Steyr Mannlicher
en.st_up_durability_3_descr: Reinforced plates that last longer to improve outfit durability.
en.st_wpn_sr2_veresk_sr2_upkit_descr:
A Russian submachine gun created as a compact weapon capable of engaging enemies wearing Russian class-II body armor and soft-skinned vehicles at distances up to 200 meters. The SR-2M is a modified version with a forward pistol grip under the handguard and a fully-foldable stock. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: TsNIITochMash
    tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_scar_siber_m1_black_descr:
In early 2004, USSOCOM issued a design request for a family of assault rifles using two different calibers while keeping the parts and ergonomics nearly-identical; hence the Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle "SCAR" was born into service. Firing the long-range, hard-hitting 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge, the selective-fire FN SCAR-H's innovative gas-operated, short-stroke piston system reduces fouling for greater reliability. This model has been modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Belgium
    manufacturer: FN Herstal, FN America
en.st_wpn_sr2_m1_descr:
A Russian submachine gun created as a compact weapon capable of engaging enemies wearing Russian class-II body armor and soft-skinned vehicles at distances up to 200 meters. The SR-2M is a modified version with a forward pistol grip under the handguard and a fully-foldable stock.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: TsNIITochMash
en.st_wpn_sr25_descr:
An AR-15 rifle scaled up to shoot larger cartridges, 60% of the SR-25's parts are interchangeable with AR-15 components. Selling well among civilian shooters who needed an accurate semi-automatic rifle for hunting or target shooting, this rifle also found use within the United State Military. The SR-25 provides military-robust construction and efficient performance, whether engaging close or long-range targets.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Knight's Armament Company
en.st_wpn_sks_b_descr:
A semi-automatic, gas-operated, self-loading carbine used primarily during the Cold War, the SKS still sees service today with second-line and reserve army units. As it lacked a fire select and was limited to 10 rounds, it was made obsolete by the AK-47.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.st_wpn_sks_descr:
A semi-automatic, gas-operated, self-loading carbine used primarily during the Cold War, the SKS still sees service today with second-line and reserve army units. As it lacked a fire select and was limited to 10 rounds, it was made obsolete by the AK-47.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.st_wpn_sig552_descr:
A compact variant of the SG 550, designed for special forces and close-quarters combat, offering increased maneuverability without sacrificing firepower. Its shorter barrel and lightweight frame enhance handling in tight spaces, while its modular design allows for easy attachment of optics and tactical accessories. Despite its reduced size, it maintains the accuracy and reliability of its full-sized counterpart, making it a highly versatile weapon.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Switzerland
    Manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.st_wpn_sig550_strelok_descr:
A precision marksman variant of the SG 550, designed for long-range accuracy and enhanced ballistic performance. Featuring a heavier barrel, improved optics compatibility, and a reinforced stock, it provides superior stability for designated marksmen. Though it is somewhat lacking in stopping power and accuracy when compared to a dedicated sniper rifle, it retains the reliability and build quality of the SG 550.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Switzerland
    Manufacturer: Swiss Arms AG
en.st_wpn_sig226_226sig_kit_descr:
The P226 set the standard by which all other combat handguns are measured. Serving alongside the U.S. Navy SEALs for decades and seeing action around the globe, its accuracy and reliability have earned its reputation as the premiere combat pistol. The custom features a threaded barrel, ergonomic grip plates and optical sight with mounting plate.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany, Switzerland
    manufacturer: SIG Sauer
    tactical kit upgrade
en.st_wpn_sig226_descr:
The P226 set the standard by which all other combat handguns are measured. Serving alongside the U.S. Navy SEALs for decades and seeing action around the globe, its accuracy and reliability have earned its reputation as the premiere combat pistol.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Germany, Switzerland
    manufacturer: SIG Sauer
en.ammo-7.62x39_ap_descr:
7.62x39 M43 is an armour piercing round produced in China, which is why it's often referred to as "7.62x39 CN". This round features a mild steel core which enhances its penetration capabilities. This Chinese round (as well as all other M43 ammunition) is currently banned for import in the US because US federal law classifies the round as an armour-piercing handgun round. This classification is based on materials and bullet design rather than on empirical ability to penetrate armour.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR5 (55) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 45
en.st_wpn_sig220_descr:
Often considered the best out-of-the-box .45 caliber double-action pistol available, the P220 is known for accuracy that parallels that of competition handguns. An instant success, it has been adopted by the Swiss and Japanese SDF and many European police organizations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: West Germany, Switzerland
    manufacturer: SIG Sauer
en.st_joint_descr:
Known for their relaxing effects, joints are used by stalkers recreationally, especially those who frequent the Barrier or the Red Forest beyond it. Induces a soothing effect if combined with alcohol. Increases hunger.
 
 PROPERTIES:
   improves morale and mind protection against horrors of the Zone
   mild dizzines removal
en.st_wpn_scar_siber_m2_descr:
In early 2004, USSOCOM issued a design request for a family of assault rifles using two different calibers while keeping the parts and ergonomics nearly-identical; hence the Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle "SCAR" was born into service. Firing the long-range, hard-hitting 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge, the selective-fire FN SCAR-H's innovative gas-operated, short-stroke piston system reduces fouling for greater reliability. This model has been modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Belgium
    manufacturer: FN Herstal, FN America
en.st_up_barp_b3_descr: A simplified rifled part is useful for close quarter combat where the emphasis is on the rate of fire rather than accuracy.
en.st_wpn_scar_siber_descr:
In early 2004, USSOCOM issued a design request for a family of assault rifles using two different calibers while keeping the parts and ergonomics nearly-identical; hence the Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle "SCAR" was born into service. Firing the long-range, hard-hitting 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge, the selective-fire FN SCAR-H's innovative gas-operated, short-stroke piston system reduces fouling for greater reliability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Belgium
    manufacturer: FN Herstal, FN America
en.st_wpn_pl15_descr:
A Russian recoil-operated, locked-breech, semi-automatic pistol, using a modified Browning cam-lock system adapted from the Browning Hi-Power pistol. Built for police and military use, the PL-15's key focus was on ergonomics and safety.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_scar_descr:
In early 2004, USSOCOM issued a design request for a family of assault rifles using two different calibers while keeping the parts and ergonomics nearly-identical; hence the Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle "SCAR" was born into service. Firing the long-range, hard-hitting 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge, the selective-fire FN SCAR-H's innovative gas-operated, short-stroke piston system reduces fouling for greater reliability.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Belgium
    manufacturer: FN Herstal, FN America
en.st_wpn_saiga12s_m2_descr:
A modified Saiga-12, customized per mercenary specifications. Equipped with a Picatinny rail and a heavy-duty muzzle brake compensator, it significantly reduces recoil, making it highly effective in close-quarters combat. This version is favored by seasoned operators who require rapid follow-up shots and enhanced stability under sustained fire.
 
PROPERTIES:
   origin: Russia
   manufacturer: Izhmash
en.st_up_bard_b3_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves flatness.
en.st_wpn_rpk74_16_descr:
Designed as a private venture by Kalashnikov Concern and intended for use by the Russian Army and special forces, the RPK-16 is based on the AK-12 assault rifle and is the proposed replacement for the venerable RPK-74. Capable of a hyperburst fire mode.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_rpk74_descr:
A light machine gun developed by Mikhail Kalashnikov as part of Soviet efforts to standardize the armory of the Red Army, the RPK replaced the RPD and is still in use as of present day. The RPK-74 features a large amount of improvements, including but not limited to an improved barrel, a new gas block for improved muzzle velocity and a bipod.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Vyatskiye Polyany Machine-Building Plant
en.st_wpn_rpd_descr:
A light machine gun developed in the Soviet Union by Vasily Degtyaryov, created as a replacement for the DPM light machine gun. The new open bolt, gas operated, striker fired RPD was, at the time, 10 pounds lighter than any other weapon of its kind in service and used a cartridge that produced significantly less recoil under automatic fire.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Degtyaryov Plant
en.st_wpn_rg6_descr:
The stand-alone, rapid-firing multi-shot RG-6 grenade launcher was designed to increase infantry firepower during urban combat due to recent small scale conflicts, such as the Chechen Wars. The RG-6 entered limited production by the mid-1990s and is now in use by various elements of the Russian Army and special forces.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: TsKIB SOO
en.st_wpn_remington870_descr:
Widely used by the public for sport, hunting and self-defence as well as by law enforcement and military organizations worldwide, the Remington 870 is one of the most famous and iconic pump-action shotguns in the world due to its characteristic recharge.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Remington Arms
en.st_wpn_remington700_mod_x_gen3_descr:
The Remington Model 700 is a series of bolt-action centerfire rifles manufactured by Remington Arms since 1962. It is a development of the Remington 721 and 722 series of rifles, which were introduced in 1948. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Remington Arms
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_remington700_lapua700_descr:
Often regarded as the number one bolt-action of all time, the Model 700 is a top choice for many military and law enforcement officers. With unequalled precision paired with unmatched build quality and reliability, it remains an industry leader to this day though its design is almost 6 decades old. This model has been modified for .338 Lapua Magnum.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Remington Arms
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_remington700_archangel_descr:
Often regarded as the number one bolt-action of all time, the Model 700 is a top choice for many military and law enforcement officers. With unequalled precision paired with unmatched build quality and reliability, it remains an industry leader to this day though its design is almost 6 decades old. This model has been extensively modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Remington Arms
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_streetsweeper_nimble_descr:
A combat shotgun (also known as the Striker) designed for rapid-fire capability, featuring a unique revolving cylinder that allows for quick follow-up shots. Its robust construction and simple operation make it highly effective for close-quarters engagements and crowd control. With a fast-loading mechanism and semi-automatic action, it is favored for military, law enforcement, and security applications.
 According to certain sources, this model once belonged to Tank, but little is known of him or whether this is actually true.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: South Africa
    Manufacturer: Various
en.st_wpn_streetsweeper_descr:
A combat shotgun (also known as the Striker) designed for rapid-fire capability, featuring a unique revolving cylinder that allows for quick follow-up shots. Its robust construction and simple operation make it highly effective for close-quarters engagements and crowd control. With a fast-loading mechanism and semi-automatic action, it is favored for military, law enforcement, and security applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: South Africa
    Manufacturer: Various
en.st_af_fireball_descr:
It is a spherical artefact made of red-coloured crystal, created in the Burner anomaly. 
It has an unique property: it has a constant temperature of 75 degrees Fahrenheit/24 degrees Celsius, regardless of its surroundings. This allows it to absorb heat from its vicinity and to create a little pocket around the user which prevents the flames from damaging the body. 
A dangerous effect of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies.It is quite heavy due to high density of crystal-like material. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_wpn_ppsh41_descr:
A selective-fire, open bolt, blowback submachine gun known for it's high rate of fire, the PPSh saw extensive combat use during World War II, becoming one of the most common infantry weapons of the Soviet Armed Forces with about six million manufactured, making it the most-produced submachine gun of the war. A PPSh with a drum magazine has become one of the symbols of the Soviet soldier on the Eastern Front of WWII Europe.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Soviet Union
en.st_wpn_ak74m_n_descr:
An improved version of the AK-74 and the service rifle of the Russian Federation, designed with modern and composite materials to significantly reduce weight and improve accuracy. Each AK-74M is fitted with a side-rail bracket for mounting optics.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: Kalashnikov Concern
en.st_wpn_pp2000_oper_descr:
Used by special operations units and law enforcement personnel, the PP-2000 personal defense weapon is often considered to be one of the best in its class. It is compact, lightweight and simple in design for increased reliability and simplified maintenance. Equipped with a Barska Electrosight, laser designator and tactical flashlight, there are few sidearms that'll have your back better than the "Operator".
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Russia
    manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_af_ball_descr:
A spherical artefact formed in electrical anomalies under unknown conditions. Very bouncy. If a person equips it and then kicks a mutant of the Zone, the artefact will smite the mutant, using its potential energy to send it flying.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Perk Artefact
en.st_wpn_l96a1_descr:
The Accuracy International Arctic Warfare rifle has proved popular as a civilian, police and military rifle since its introduction in the 1980s and is the standard sniper rifle for the British army. Impressive performance modifications allow the weapon to be used in temperatures as low as -40C, without impairing operation in less extreme conditions.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United Kingdom
    manufacturer: Accuracy International
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_wpn_pm_bas_custom_descr:
This Soviet legacy is one of the best compact self-defence handguns available. Small, highly reliable, easy to use and easy to maintain, the Pistol Makarova was selected because of its simplicity, easy manufacturing, accuracy and reasonable stopping power. Unfortunately though, it loses out to modern pistols in its class in terms of weight, magazine size and general performance. The Custom includes a threaded barrel and tritium iron sights.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_wpn_pm_bas_actor_descr:
This Soviet legacy is one of the best compact self-defence handguns available. Small, highly reliable, easy to use and easy to maintain, the Pistol Makarova was selected because of its simplicity, easy manufacturing, accuracy and reasonable stopping power. Unfortunately though, it loses out to modern pistols in its class in terms of weight, magazine size and general performance.
