en.st_up_zatp_a1_descr: Provides an increase in rate of fire without overloading other parts through additional recoil.
en.st_up_barp_b1_descr: Chrome plating improves the barrel's life cycle.
en.st_up_barp_c1_descr: Allows barrel heat to be reduced and increases the rate of fire without sacrificing flatness.
en.st_up_auto_b4_descr: A component installed on the rear side of the receiver that reduces bolt speed. Installed to improve effectiveness of aimed fire.
en.st_up_auto_c6_descr: A link fixes the position of the barrel and if the barrel moves, additional compensation holes are opened.
en.st_up_pri_c2_descr: Partial lengthening of the bolt frame into the stock allows flatness to be increased at the cost of more recoil.
en.st_up_helm_chem_1_descr: A filter with a reinforced anti-corrosive coating and an additional preventing layer for removal of poisons.
en.st_up_bar_b1_descr: Replacement of a dated component with a more modern one reduces recoil
en.st_up_zat_c2_descr: Installation of a gas pistol stops gases from entering the bolt frame, which considerably reduces weapon dirtiness.
en.st_up_usm_b3_descr: Removal of the combat spring allows the first shot to be made half a second earlier. It may not be much, but it can save your life.
en.st_up_stk_a2_descr: A high durability receiver helps assault rifles endure combat conditions on a daily basis.
en.st_up_zat_c3_descr: This system collects some of the gases using the bolt section to improve its movement.
en.ammo-9x39-pab9_descr:
The SP-5 is a subsonic rifle round with a bimetallic casing. The round contains a steel core with a gap behind it that is filled with lead. Requires a suppressor for stealth firing. Used by special services of Warsaw Pact countries.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (34) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 43 
 
SPECIAL:
 
 -  sub-sonic ammunition
 -  greatly increased projectile drop with distance
en.st_up_zath_a1_descr: In absorbing some of the heat, the components reduce weapon temperature changes during firing.
en.st_up_zat_b1_descr: Gas vent comes with a block that moves at the same speed, taking on part of the recoil.
en.ammo-5.56x45-fmj_descr:
A standard-issue NATO 5.56x45 calibre M193 round specially designed for accurate automatic fire. Provides good ballistic characteristics, having been designed on the basis of a hunting round. Well known for being used in the Vietnam war and having great performance against tissue, but limited penetration.
 
 -  Armor penetration power (AP): BR3 (29) 
 -  Nominal stopping power (DMG): 35
en.st_antirad_descr:
Mexaminum radiation protection drugs are common in the Zone. When used, this drug induces contraction of peripheral blood vessels and oxygen deprivation, which serve to treat and prevent radiation exposure. The drug does not have severe side effects, although isolated cases of mild nausea, dizziness, cramps and stomach pain have been reported. It also contains opiates derivatives to prevent the pain.
 
 PROPERTIES:
en.st_up_zatp_b2_descr: Softens recoil by slowing down bolt section movement.
en.st_up_zatp_c1_descr: Short movement considerably increases the weapon's rate of fire without sacrificing flatness.
en.st_up_barp_a1_descr: Replacement of a regular barrel with a longer one improves accuracy and flatness, but reduces the rate of fire.
en.st_up_stvp_b1_descr: A technical replacement of the pistol frame with a lighter one does not affect the weapon's reliability.
en.st_up_usmp_b1_descr: One of the simplest and most popular modifications, which allows for trigger resistance to be reduced. Simple and handy.
en.st_up_add_a1_descr: External threading allows a silencer to be installed.
en.st_bottle_metal_descr:
A metal flask containing a portion of what seems to be Zone-produced vodka. While more affordable, the fumes are strong and the quality and taste is lacking, but it gets the job done.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Drink
    Alcohol
en.st_wpn_bm16_full_descr:
A break-action double barrel shotgun intended for amateur hunting and general civilian use. Though heavy and unwieldy, it packs an undeniable punch.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Soviet Union
    manufacturer: Tula Arms Plant
en.st_addon_scope_226sig_kit_descr:
A comprehensive upgrade package that includes grips, rails, stocks, and other enhancements to improve weapon ergonomics, control, and overall combat effectiveness.
 
 KIT INCLUDES:
    Threaded Barrel (for Suppressor)
    Trijicon RMR Sight
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
    SIG P226R
en.st_addon_scope_vulcan_descr:
Compact Gen-3 night vision riflescope offering a true 3.5x magnification in a short, rugged housing built for weapon mounting. Features manual/automatic gain control, an internal reticle with illumination, and provisions for long-range IR illumination and remote controldesigned as a hands-on, combat-grade NV module rather than a precision daylight optic.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
    Manufacturer: Armasight
    Magnification: 3.5x
    Night Vision Toggle: press Mark Switch key
en.st_up_stk_a3_descr: A simple addition of weight to the front of the receiver to reduce recoil.
en.st_prt_o_ballistic_3: Kevlar K129 Plates w/ Polycarbonate Composite
en.st_up_bar_a3_descr: This modification is used to reduce the harm caused by excessive firing rate modifications.
en.st_up_bar_c2_descr: Allows barrel heat to be reduced and increases the rate of fire.
en.st_up_bard_c3_descr: Thickening with poly-materials allows barrel pressure to be increased, improving bullet speed.
en.st_wpn_trg_descr:
A firearm designed for serious long-range competitions, able to be equipped with a vast array of accessories to meet the most demanding requirements. Its consistent accuracy and reliability have made it popular both in long-range competitions and military sniper operations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Finland
    manufacturer: Sako
   Increased penetration: +5
en.st_af_dummy_glassbeads_descr:
Shaped like a DNA helix, Mama's Beads are created in the Burner anomaly. One of their most characteristic features is that they constantly pulsate, generating emissions beneficial to the human body. These emissions increase the metabolism of any living creature, accelerating coagulation and healing of wounds.The mechanism behind the effects of this artefact is still unknown. 
Mama's Beads also possess potent protective qualities: they are able to shield the body and objects from extreme heat. 
On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. 
The weight is also quite high for such a small artefact, which leads to a conclusion that is of high density. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_autd_b3_descr: Often used in weaponry, a roller locking system reduces recoil and improves groupings.
en.st_up_autd_c1_descr: Protective sputter makes misfiring due to mechanism malfunction impossible.
en.st_up_autd_c4_descr: A unified blowback module is one of the best technological solutions for reducing recoil.
en.st_up_barp_a3_descr: A more technological shortened barrel improves the weapon's rate of fire without sacrificing flatness and accuracy.
en.st_up_stvp_a2_descr: In this case the frame is more reliable than composite.
en.st_up_stvp_b5_descr: A change in the rear section makes for a more ergonomic handle shape.
en.st_up_usmp_b4_descr: A modern modification which prevents the weapon from bolt section detachment.
en.st_up_binoc_a2_descr: Installation of new lens set for farther distances, which offers x15 magnification power.
en.st_af_death_lamp_descr:
"Big, red and cursed." 
This is how the locals prefer to describe the Death Lamp, while some refer to it as the "Seed of Satan". Many traders believe the rumours surrounding the artefact, thus refusing to buy it. Little is known about its origins, and nothing of value has been discovered so far. 
Death Lamp was first discovered few years ago by a group of three experienced stalkers. Shortly after delivering the artefact to the Ecologists in Yantar, two of them found dead with a horrific expression on their faces. Nothing is known about the fate of the third stalker. 
Following the accident, members of the science team who studied the artefact had reported having nightmare disorder in the days to follow. 
Apart from the mysterious effects, the artefact drains vitality and willpower from the user, often on such a scale that it induces dizziness and in extreme cases causes the user to faint. 

 Does NOT degrade over time.
en.st_up_binoc_c1_descr: Replacements to the housing style in order to reduce the overall weight by implementing an open-bridge and chassis made of an aluminium alloy.
en.st_up_usm_c2_descr: Boltless fixing allows for automatic load to be increased, considerably improving the weapon's rate of fire.
en.st_kukri_descr:
A distinctively curved blade known for its powerful chopping ability, traditionally used as both a tool and a weapon. Its weighted forward design makes it highly effective for cutting, making it a staple in survival, combat, and utility applications.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Use: Field Dressing Mutants
    Melee Weapon
    Light Attack Power: 65
    Heavy Attack Power: 117
    Armor Penetration: 35
    Cuts Thick Mutant Skin?: YES
    Mutant Pelt Quality: 75% - 98%
en.st_up_bard_b2_descr: Synthetic thickening of the barrel cavity causes a considerable improvement in groupings.
en.st_up_bard_b6_descr: This sputter prevents the barrel from overheating, removes manufacturing defects and significantly increases the barrel's life cycle.
en.st_up_stvd_a1_descr: The cavity inside the handle allows the weapon's weight to be reduced.
en.st_wpn_grach_descr:
One of the standard military-issued sidearms in Russia, the MP-443 Grach is a double-action, short-recoil, semi-automatic pistol known for its reliability and versatility in the field. It is widely recognized for its smooth trigger pull and simplified design making it easy to disassemble and maintain.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Austria
    manufacturer: Izhevsk Mechanical Plant
en.st_up_autd_b1_descr: A low impulse firing mechanism ensures less recoil than older versions.
en.st_up_zatp_c3_descr: A replacement of the automatic parts is more of an optimization than improvement of the gas piston. This considerably improves the weapon's rate of fire.
en.st_up_barp_b5_descr: Unloading the barrel allows recoil to be reduced considerably.
en.st_up_usmp_a1_descr: The trigger is armed by the first shot, with all other shots occurring during automatic trigger arming.
en.st_up_zatp_b6_descr: A small buffer that takes on some of the recoil.
en.st_up_zatp_b8_descr: By increasing bolt movement and reinforcing the return mechanism appropriately, you can improve flatness.
en.st_up_barp_c3_descr: A pneumatic booster allows some of the recoil to be converted into higher barrel pressure, increasing muzzle velocity.
en.st_up_stvp_a1_descr: An expensive frame for a weapon that will serve a long time.
en.st_up_zatp_c4_descr: Installation of this module considerably improves groupings without sacrificing firing speed.
en.st_up_opt_dynamo_hand2_descr: Replacement of steel parts of the generator frame for duralumin significantly reducing the weight.
en.st_up_zat_a2_descr: Thickening of the bolt section prevents energy dissipation, which improves flatness.
en.st_up_opt_a2_descr: Mounting of an optical scope for medium and long range combat.
en.st_addon_sil_kek12_descr:
A suppressor tailored for 12-gauge shotguns, reducing both noise and felt recoil while maintaining effective shot dispersion.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
 
 COMPATIBILITY:
    12 gauge
en.st_wpn_scar_siber_m1_descr:
In early 2004, USSOCOM issued a design request for a family of assault rifles using two different calibers while keeping the parts and ergonomics nearly-identical; hence the Special Operations Forces Combat Assault Rifle "SCAR" was born into service. Firing the long-range, hard-hitting 7.62x51mm NATO cartridge, the selective-fire FN SCAR-H's innovative gas-operated, short-stroke piston system reduces fouling for greater reliability. This model has been modified.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: Belgium
    manufacturer: FN Herstal, FN America
en.st_wpn_9a91n_descr:
A compact and lightweight assault rifle designed for special forces and law enforcement, offering high firepower in a small frame. Its simple yet durable design allows for reliable performance in urban combat and close-quarters engagements. With its ability to mount suppressors and optics, it is a versatile weapon suited for both stealth operations and direct confrontations.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: Russia
    Manufacturer: KBP Instrument Design Bureau
en.st_up_stvp_b4_descr: Protective thickening flaps should protect the weapon from dirt and impact.
en.st_up_auts_a1_descr: Modernization that allows the trigger mechanism to be smoother, which is important for snipers.
en.st_up_bard_b4_descr: The introduction of gas venting canals to the barrel not only prevents it from collecting dirt, but also partially redirects recoil into the barrel itself.
en.st_addon_scope_razor_descr:
Holographic sight with a precision reticle (1 MOA dot + rapid-lead ring), unlimited eye relief, NV-capable. Waterproof, fog- and shock-proof for brutal CQB use.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United States
    Manufacturer: Vortex
    Magnification: 1x
en.st_up_add_b5_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.
en.st_up_usmp_c2_descr: A new technological development that allows a simple adjustment to change the firing mechanism mode - another step towards better ergonomics and easy weapon adjustment.
en.st_addon_scope_susatov_descr:
PROPERTIES:
    Origin: United Kingdom
    Manufacturer: Avimo
    Magnification: 4x
en.st_up_auts_b3_descr: As sniper rifles are more demanding in terms of maintenance than regular weapons, they can be upgraded with three-positional gas regulation devices.
en.st_up_auth_c2_descr: When the weapon is fired, the bolt frame counter-weight moves in the opposite direction to the bolt, which allows for more comfortable firing of the machine gun.
en.st_wpn_colt1911_n_descr:
Designed by John Browning, the M1911 is an extremely reliable and robust pistol that remained the standard-issue side arm of the US military from 1911 to 1985. To this day, it remains very popular for military, police and civilian use around the world.
 
 PROPERTIES:
    origin: United States
    manufacturer: Colt Manufacturing Company
en.st_up_add_b6_descr: A complex, integrated alteration of the weapon's mechanical and automated parts, which allows its calibre to be changed at the cost of reliability.

en.st_up_zath_c1_descr: Symmetrical force cooling of a part of the barrel happens due to the work of an ejector and prevents weapon overheating.
en.st_up_auth_c1_descr: Replacement of the weapon's bolt mechanism with a more suitable design, which improves the rate of fire.

en.st_up_stvh_a1_descr: A change of material reduces barrel damage from uneven heating during firing, which allows the weapon's rate of fire to be increased.
en.st_up_stvs_c2_descr: Sinusoidal rifling of the barrel chamber is usually performed on assault weapons to increase their rate of fire.

 COMPATIBILITY:
